title: tuberaria variabilis var. llensae
intro: Tuberaria variabilis var. llensae, also known as the Llensa tuberaria, is a type of flowering plant native to the Canary Islands. It is used for its medicinal properties, particularly its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions such as kidney stones and arthritis. The health benefits of Llensa tuberaria include reducing inflammation, improving urinary function, and promoting overall well-being. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also sometimes used in herbal remedies and supplements.
